creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-06-28 02:22:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/fossil         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    devel/fossil/files   patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Fossil is an easy-to-use Distributed Source Control Management system (DSCM)
  which supports access and administration over HTTP CGI or via a built-in HTTP
  server, has a built-in wiki, built-in file browsing, a built-in tickets system,
  etc
  
  WWW:    http://fossil-scm.org/
  
  PR:             ports/147867
  Submitted by:   Bapt <baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3977    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/devel/fossil/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/fossil/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/fossil/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/fossil/pkg-descr (new)
